landing.title: Audit your GitHub repo with AI
landing.subtitle: Paste the link — GitDeep scores architecture, security, community signals and documentation; your PDF report lands in your inbox.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.desc: Separation of concerns, scalability and clean code review. 30 points.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Hardcoded secret scanning and dependency risk analysis. 30 points.

engagement.title: Community
engagement.desc: GitHub statistics and production-ready signals. 20 points.

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.desc: Commit message quality and README professionalism. 20 points.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From link to report in three steps.

steps.title: Paste your repo link
steps.desc: See the exact credit cost upfront, based on repo size — no surprises.

steps.title: Claude reviews your code
steps.desc: Two-stage AI analysis scores architecture, security, community signals and docs.

steps.title: Get your PDF report
steps.desc: Delivered instantly in-app and by email, ready to share or act on.

techStack.title: Built on tools you already trust
techStack.subtitle: GitDeep's pipeline runs on a modern, production-grade stack — no black boxes.

sample.title: See what a GitDeep report looks like
sample.subtitle: Every analysis returns a scored breakdown across four dimensions — here's a sample.
sample.verdict: Solid architecture with clear module boundaries; tighten dependency pinning and add setup docs to the README.

finalCta.title: Ready to see your score?
finalCta.subtitle: Free credits on signup — no card required to try it.

auth.verifyFailed: Verification failed — link invalid or expired.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.verifyBanner: You need to verify your email before starting an analysis.
dashboard.newAnalysisDesc: Paste a GitHub repo link, get the report in your inbox.

analyze.title: New analysis
analyze.subtitle: Paste a public GitHub repository link — see the cost first, then confirm.
analyze.verifyRequired: Verify your email to run an analysis.

job.title: Analysis in progress
job.waiting: You'll be redirected when the report is ready; an email is on its way too.
job.refunded: {credits} credits were refunded to your account.

billing.title: Buy credits
billing.subtitle: Pick a package — pay by card or crypto, credits land in your account automatically.
billing.successPending: Payment confirmed — credits will appear in your balance shortly.
billing.cancelledBody: Checkout was cancelled — no charge was made.

tierDesc.starter: For trying GitDeep on a repo or two.
tierDesc.pro: For regular audits across your projects.

features: Full architecture, security, community & docs scoring
PDF report delivered to your inbox

footer.tagline: AI-powered GitHub repo audits — architecture, security, community and docs, scored and delivered to your inbox.
